title: Home Screen - Charger case pop up appears after 1st, 3rd, 5th, 10th 15th... app launch
scenario: Charging case pop-up dialog reappears repeatedly on home screen on every other app launch when case firmware is outdated
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device with a charging case is paired and connected.
3. Verify the charging case is on outdated firmware.
4. Close the app completely (swipe from recents).
5. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Observe whether the charging case pop-up dialog appears on the Home screen.
expected: The charging case pop-up dialog should appear only on the very first connection/launch after pairing, and should NOT reappear on subsequent app restarts (2nd, 3rd, 4th, etc.).
